author: Wolfie8935
name: 4090 ablations on ValCalib GPTQ+XSA stack (incomplete matrix)
blurb: Non-record submission documenting single RTX 4090 ablations (TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=196608) on the 2026-03-25 ValCalib / AR self-gen GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 lineage. Includes logs for ctrl, a1, a2, b1 only; c1/c2/d1/d2 not packaged. Best included sliding BPB from train_a1_calib192_seed314.log: final_int6_sliding_window_exact val_bpb ~1.56854187 — not comparable to 8xH100 SOTA. Ctrl log interrupted before sliding eval in captured run.
val_bpb_note: 4090 single-GPU reduced microbatch; not comparable to 8xH100 leaderboard
known_log_issues: train_ctrl_seed314.log: process received SIGTERM before final_int6_sliding_window_exact in captured log
